name: Turmeric
specimenCopy: A root lifted from the soil, boiled briefly, then sun-dried for days. The drying concentrates it. What you use in the kitchen is not fresh turmeric aged — it's a different material, transformed on purpose.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Earthy ginger, orange peel, warm wood dust
sensoryProfile.flavor: Warm bitter-spice, citrusy-woody undertones, lingering dry finish
